title: oreoselinum latifolium
intro: Oreoselinum latifolium, also known as Angelica pubescens, is a plant species in the carrot family (Apiaceae) native to East Asia, particularly in China, Japan, and Korea. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiviral, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant activities, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Oreoselinum latifolium include reducing fever, alleviating pain and inflammation, and supporting the immune system, as well as exhibiting potential anti-cancer properties. Oreoselinum latifolium can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, as well as being dried and used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties.
